changeSet.author: poserbb
poserbb
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO regions (code, name) VALUES (77, 'Московский регион'), (78, 'Санкт-Петербургский регион'), (50, 'Московская область') ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;
INSERT INTO cities (code, name_ru, name_en, population, region_id) VALUES (495, 'Москва', 'Moscow', 13010112, (SELECT id FROM regions WHERE code = 77)), (812, 'Санкт-Петербург', 'Saint Petersburg', 5601911, (SELECT id FROM regions WHERE code = 78)) ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;
